name: Skinless Roast Chicken Breast Salad with Vegetable Chips (h
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup oil low in saturated fat
i.e: canola, cottonseed, canola-olive oil blend, or soybean
whole roasted cardamom, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and Nigerian cayenne (in equal amounts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the chicken breasts if they are boneless. Pound them to an even thickness.
2. Mix all spices, herbs, and oil in a bowl or holding pan until well combined.
3. Place the chicken in the spice mixture and marinate for at least 1 hour.
4. Heat 2 teaspoons of desired oil in a medium sauté pan over medium heat until nearly smoking hot.
5. Add the chicken skin side down into the pan. Sear for 20 to 30 seconds or until golden brown, then flip and cook without excess fat for an additional 8 minutes if boneless or 15-18 minutes with the bone in.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
7. Peel off the skin using a small knife and slice the meat into thin pieces.
8. Fan out the sliced meat over Wilted Mustard Greens (recipe follows). Drizzle Spinach and Roasted Garlic Vinaigrette (recipe follows) lightly over the chicken and plate. Garnish with fresh beet and carrot chips that have been slow roasted at 275°F.
Yield: 2 servings
